subcodes.first_line: O ye who stand fast in the Covenant! The written page was received and the unfolded scroll was perused, with its divine themes and spiritual meanings [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابتان بر پیمان ورق مسطور منظور گشت و رق منشور ملحوظ گردید مضامین و معانی رحمانی
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @suffering and imprisonment, @station; mission; authority of Abdu'l-Baha
